sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50714" key="i(pphmolgi(a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππημολγ-ἱα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n50714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">milking of mares</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:855" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">855</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
